External reference

Catalyst UI Kit

Scraped public API (catalyst.tailwindui.com/docs) + clean-room TSX reconstructions. Reference only — see LICENSE_NOTE.md.

Contents

  • sourced/
    25 scraped API pages
  • components/
    Reconstructed TSX
  • tokens.json
    Design tokens

Forms

  • • Button (3 styles × 23 colors)
  • • Input · InputGroup
  • • Textarea
  • • Select (native) · Listbox (Headless) · Combobox (Headless+filter)
  • • Checkbox / CheckboxField / CheckboxGroup
  • • Radio / RadioField / RadioGroup
  • • Switch / SwitchField / SwitchGroup
  • • Fieldset / Legend / FieldGroup / Field / Label / Description / ErrorMessage

Navigation & overlays

  • • Navbar · NavbarSection · NavbarSpacer · NavbarDivider · NavbarItem
  • • Sidebar · SidebarHeader · SidebarBody · SidebarFooter · SidebarSection · SidebarSpacer · SidebarHeading · SidebarDivider · SidebarItem
  • • Dropdown (Menu) · Items · Section · Heading · Label · Description · Shortcut · Header · Divider
  • • Pagination · Previous · Next · List · Page · Gap
  • • Dialog · Alert · Title · Description · Body · Actions

Data display

  • • Table (bleed / dense / grid / striped)
  • • DescriptionList · Term · Details
  • • Avatar · AvatarButton (src / initials / square)
  • • Badge (18 colors) · BadgeButton
  • • Heading · Subheading (level 1–6)
  • • Text · TextLink · Strong · Code
  • • Divider (soft)

Layouts

  • • SidebarLayout (mobile drawer + desktop rail)
  • • StackedLayout (horizontal nav + mobile drawer)
  • • AuthLayout (centered form)

Design tokens

Font
Inter + feature settings cv02 cv03 cv04 cv11
Radius (input/btn)
0.625rem (lg)
Adaptive colors
dark/zinc · light · dark/white
Solid palette
20 colors (red→rose)
Focus ring
2px blue-500, 2px offset
Touch target
2.75rem minimum
Scraped 2026-04-21 · Catalyst is a paid product of Tailwind Labs. This folder contains scraped public docs + independent reconstructions for internal reference only. See LICENSE_NOTE.md.
